title: dimorphotheca zeyheri
intro: Dimorphotheca zeyheri, also known as the annual dimorphotheca or African daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dimorphotheca zeyheri include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues, while also promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
